title: KEWAYO Retractable Pen Utility Knife, 6-Piece Craft Cutting Set with 24 Blades, Precision Pen Cutter for Scrapbooking, Journaling, Card Making & School Projects
features: High Qualit: Pen holder is made of plastic, Two types of blades are made of safe stainless ceramic and tungsten,‌long-lasting and sharp

Replaceable Blades: The set comes with 2 types of blades in ceramic or tungsten carbide, the ceramic blades are completely safe and won't hurt your hands and the tungsten blades have high toughness and sharpness for smooth cutting more efficient
Safty Design: Retractable pen design can be retracted when not in use, which can avoid getting stabbed with tips, ensuring safety and convenience
Pen Shape: The utility knife with pen-shaped and pocket clip design for easy to carry and store, The rubber handle for soft holding feeling and better grip

Wide Application: The pen knife set is suitable for cutting paper, newspapers and stickers, ideal for making newspaper clippings, brochures, notebooks, greeting cards, decorative clippings...etc. Suitable to meet your different needs
description: Product Description Retractable pen tip design When not in use, it can be retracted to avoid sharp punctures and ensure safety and comfort. Cutting edges are clean and smooth The cutting head is compact and not easy to hurt hands. Silicone grip design Silicone sleeves protect fingers and prevent fatigue. Specification: Material: Ceramic/Tungsten Carbide + Plastic Color: As shown in the picture Total Length: 142mm/5.6inch Warm Tips: 1~ The color of the actual item may be slightly different from the images due to the difference between different monitors. 2~ Please allow 1-2cm measuring error due to manual measurement, thanks for your understanding. 2~ The blade is sharp, please be careful when using. Package including: 6 x Pen Type Craft Knife 12 x Tungsten Carbide Refill Blades 12 x Ceramic Refill Blades
